source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Inter for compact dashboard UI, Geist Mono for tabular burrow and tide data, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese navigation, forms, search, table labels, and status text.
layout: Asymmetric dashboard grids, offset navigation rails, denser data surfaces opposite large action panels, 8px radii, tidal divider lines, speckled shell texture, mud-brown borders, orange primary actions, and teal focus states.

prompts.label: Transparent fiddler crab motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, copied from this worker's generated-images snapshot, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt: Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: Morphous Fiddler Crab transparent motif chroma-key source. Primary request: Create only an isolated fiddler crab claw motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text. Subject: A single accurate fiddler crab with strong natural asymmetry: one oversized raised orange male claw, one tiny opposite claw, compact mud-brown carapace, slender legs, eyestalks, subtle teal-water reflected highlights on the shell and leg joints, tiny natural mud speckles on the body, crisp shell texture, and realistic crustacean anatomy. The subject should feel like a mangrove mudflat animal translated into a precise catalog cutout. Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full crab, the entire large claw, the small claw, all legs, eyestalks, and body without cropping. Slight three-quarter view, large claw to one side to emphasize asymmetry. Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves orange claw, mud brown shell, teal reflected highlights, and fine shell detail. Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject. Constraints: no beach scene, no mangrove roots, no water puddle, no sand floor, no second crab, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no text, no watermark.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation using the transparent motif as visual context, copied from this worker's generated-images snapshot, then saved as a 3840x2160 16:9 PNG.
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Fiddler Crab light-mode design-system board. Input image role: The visible transparent fiddler crab motif is the source reference for palette, texture, contrast, asymmetry, and visual language. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Fiddler Crab", derived from the visible transparent fiddler crab cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels, sparse enough to survive gallery preview downscaling; avoid dense tiny paragraphs. Required visible sections: Morphous Fiddler Crab, Fiddler Crab, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from the crab's oversized orange claw, mud-brown carapace and legs, wet shell highlights, ivory claw tips, teal water reflections, mangrove mudflat shadows, and tiny shell speckles. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, asymmetrical chart layout, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, data cards, and simple product icons. Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style asymmetric dashboard system, precise product grid, 8px maximum radius, quiet mudflat light surfaces, orange claw primary actions, teal water accents, mud-brown borders, ivory highlights, tidal ripple dividers, speckled shell textures, offset navigation rail, and deliberate asymmetric component weighting inspired by the crab claw. Typography: show English UI type plus Japanese typography guidance, with short readable Japanese samples such as ナビゲーション, 検索, 状態, and データ. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; avoid unrelated saturated colors, generic purple/blue gradients, and one-note orange/brown dominance. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Fiddler Crab" or "Fiddler Crab", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation using the transparent motif and light board as visual context, copied from this worker's generated-images snapshot, then saved as a 3840x2160 16:9 PNG.
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Fiddler Crab dark-mode design-system board. Input image roles: The visible transparent fiddler crab motif is the source motif reference, and the visible light-mode board is the layout and component-language reference. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Fiddler Crab". It must feel like the same visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible fiddler crab cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels, sparse enough to survive gallery preview downscaling; avoid dense tiny paragraphs. Required visible sections: Morphous Fiddler Crab, Fiddler Crab, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Reference use: Preserve the light board's asymmetric dashboard language, section coverage, navigation pattern, cards, forms, table, search palette, status states, token rows, texture samples, 8px radius, and spacing system. Visual details: dark background derived from mangrove mudflat night, wet dark mud, and deep carapace brown; foreground from ivory claw tips and foam highlights; primary actions from vivid orange claw; secondary states from muted teal water; surfaces from charcoal mud, dark umber, and wet shell brown; borders from shell speckles; subtle tidal ripple texture overlays and low, crisp shadows. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, asymmetric charts, empty/loading/error states, forms, tables, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, and shadows. Typography: show English UI type plus Japanese typography guidance, with short readable Japanese samples such as ナビゲーション, 検索, 状態, and データ. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no one-note orange/brown dominance. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Fiddler Crab" or "Fiddler Crab", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
